title: Alex Scheduled Tasks
description: Configuration for scheduled trifecta execution via GitHub Actions

id.description: Unique task identifier, used in workflow filename

skill.description: Related skill name (for cloud agent matching)

mode.description: agent = create issue for Copilot cloud agent; direct = run muscle script

schedule.description: POSIX cron expression (UTC). GitHub Actions syntax.

promptFile.description: Path to issue body template (mode=agent only)

muscleArgs.description: Arguments to pass to muscle script

dependsOn.description: Task IDs that must complete successfully before this task runs. Used for ordered execution chains.

changeDetection.description: Adaptive scheduling: skip task when no relevant changes detected since last run

enabled.description: Whether to check for changes before running

paths.description: Glob patterns to watch. Task skips if none of these paths changed since last successful run.

maxIdleDays.description: Force run after this many days even if no changes detected. Prevents indefinite skipping.

useWorktree.description: Cloud agents create worktree branches instead of committing to main. Creates PR for review.
